channel.title: Posts on Clarity

item.title: My First Post
item.description:
clarity theme
hugo
clarity proyect en github
clarity proyect local
markdown cheat sheet
clarity tutorial

item.title: nushell
item.description: config nu

item.title: hacker
item.description:
escanear la red local para encontrar hosts activos

sudo nmap -sn -R 192.168.0.0/24 sudo arp-scan --localnet

item.title: qemu
item.description:
virsh start fedora
virsh console fedora
virsh -e '^a' console fedora
virsh shutdown fedora

virt-viewer fedora

item.title: node
item.description:
modulos

forma antigua: CJS (commonjs)

con require

forma moderna: es ESM (ecma script module)

con import
extension .mjs

npm

mpm init -y
npm i express
npm i nodemon --save-dev

ejs

  1. <%= %> → mostrar un valor
  2. <%- %> → mostrar HTML crudo
  3. <% %> → lógica (no imprime)

item.title: cmus
item.description:
1 - library 2 - library 3 - playlist
4 - cola
5 - browser
6 - filtros 7 - ajustes

vim keys
c pause
v stop
b next
z prev
y yank agrega a playlist
espacio marca (2-5)
e agrega a cola
s shuffle
r repeat

item.title: systemd-nspawn
item.description:
debian wiki creacion: debootstrap --include=systemd,dbus stable /var/lib/machines/debian
boot:
systemd-nspawn --boot -U -D /var/lib/machines/debian machinectl list
machinectl login

item.title: repetidor
item.description:
resetear el repetidor estando conectado
con el celular sacar los datos y conectarse al wifi del repetidor
entrar en tplinkrepeater.net o 192.168.0.254
configurar

item.title: Yazı
item.description:
yazi
por lo general sigue los atajos de teclado de vim
F1 help
~ help
a create file
name/ create directory
z zoxide
. toggle hidden files
d delete file
r rename file
/ search file
s fd search
S ripgrep search
f filter files
F search file recursive (fuzzy)
shell command (block)
; shell command ej: ;eog "$0"
y yank (copy)
p paste
c copy path
, sort
g h go home
t create tab
W w set wallpaper
J jump to char

item.title: Broot
item.description:
Broot
comando
espacio comando
alt+enter cd
:q quit
:h toggle hidden files
:z zoxide interactive
verbos: cp, mv, mkdir, rm, touch, rename, create
edit copypathtoclipboard
file-roller
nvim file (v file) setwallpaper

:stage pasa al stage area
:panel_derecho
:panel_izquierdo

item.title: neovim
item.description:
tips

% va al compañero de llave, paréntesis, corchete, etc
asterisco selecciona todas las palabras que coincidan con la palabra bajo el cursor
control-v visual block mode
control-O en insert mode permite ejecutar un comando en normal mode y luego volver al insert mode
u undo
control-r redo
!! en normal mode ejecuta un comando de shell y reemplaza la línea actual con su salida
g; va a la ultima modificacion
ciq change inside quotes
:.! comando de shell para la línea actual ej :.!date
r !for i in {1..30}; do echo "$i-"; done

item.title: c++
item.description:
tutorial

build

 1CMakeLists.txt
 2mkdir build
 3cd build
 4cmake ..
 5cmake --build .
 6
 7archivo.pro
 8qmake
 9make        # En Linux/macOS
10nmake       # En Windows con Visual Studio
11mingw32-make # En Windows con MinGW

cppreference

1int main(int argc, char* argv[]){
2// comment
3/* multi
4line
5comment */ 
6    int numero1 = 10;
7    int numero2 {20}
8}

libraries

include
include
include
include
include
include
include

std::cout << "hello world" << std::endl;

booleans

true (1)
false (0)
bool red_light {true};

switch

solo para integer y enum?
switch(variable) {
case algo : { }
break; case algo :{ }
break; default : { } break; }

item.title: hora debian
item.description: ntp config

item.title: qt
item.description:
tutorial
Hacer un programa:
qmake6 test.prog make
./test

compilar programa de c

gcc programa.c -o programa
./programa

item.title: qtile
item.description:
keys

mod r: spawn app
mod ctrl r: reload config
mod enter: terminal
mod f: fullscreen
mod t: floating
mod tab: cycle layout
mod hjkl: focus window
mod ctrl hl: prev-next group
mod n: normalize window
mod w: kill window
mod ctrl q: quit qtile
mod o g: start chrome

xephyr

Xephyr -br -ac -noreset -xkb-layout es -fullscreen :1 &
DISPLAY=:1 qtile start
ctrl shift grabs keyboard and mouse

item.title: debian
item.description:
apt

apt purge program-name # elimina config global del programa
apt autoremove # elimina dependencias no utilizadas

node

curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | sudo bash -
sudo apt-get install -y nodejs

repositories

directorio /etc/apt/sources.list.d

sonido

alsamixer disable automute

xcompose

en ~/.XCompose:

1include "%L"   # import the default Compose file for your locale
2#<Multi_key> <bar> <greater>     : "▸"
3#<Multi_key> <a> <b> : "people"
4#<a> <b> : "sin multikey"
5<Multi_key> <Multi_key> <a> : "ã"
6<Multi_key> <Multi_key> <o> : "õ"
7<Multi_key> <Multi_key> <e> : "ê"

en ~/.config/autostart/xmodmap.desktop

item.title: startx
item.description:
1
2Xephyr -br -ac -noreset -screen 1680x1050 :1 -fullscreen &
3DISPLAY=:1 startxfce4

item.title: decoradores
item.description:
1
 2def registrar_en_archivo(ruta_archivo):
 3    def decorador(func):
 4        def envoltura(*args, **kargs):
 5            resultado = func(*args, **kargs)
 6            with open(ruta_archivo, "a") as archivo:
 7                archivo.write(f"llamada a {func.__name__} con argumentos {args} y {kargs}")
 8            return resultado
 9        return envoltura
10    return decorador
11
12@registrar_en_archivo("/tmp/registro.txt")
13def multiplicar(a, b):
14    return a*b
15
16print(multiplicar(3,4))

item.title: awk
item.description:
tutorial
yt

imprime la primer columna

1ls -l / | awk '{print $1}'
2cat /etc/passwd | awk -F ':' '{print $1}'

$0: todo
$NF: ultima columna
-F: delimitador

usando un archivo

1ps -ef | awk -f comandos.awk
2awk -f comandos.awk test1.txt

bucle for

1echo 11 22 33 | awk '{total=0; for(i=0; i<NF; i++) total+=$i; print total}'
2echo "buenas tardes perri" | awk '{for(i=1;i<=NF;i++) {print $i; system("sleep 1")}}'

begin, end

1ls -l / | awk 'BEGIN {print "tamaño de los archivos"} {print $9, $5} END{print "chau"}'
2awk 'BEGIN{printf "Col1\tCol2\tCol3\n"} {print $2"\t"$3"\t"$7} END{print "Done"}' test1.txt

while

1echo | awk '{i=0; while(i<10){ print i; i++}}'
2awk 'BEGIN{c=0; do {print c; c++} while(c<10)}'

variables

1awk -v var1=xyz 'BEGIN{printf "var1 = %s\n", var1}'
2ps -ef | awk '{print NF}'  #NF = number of fields(columnas)
3ps -ef | awk '{print NR}'  #NR = record number

patterns

1ps -ef | awk ' /tty/ {print}'
2ps -ef | awk ' !/root/ {print}'
3ps -ef | awk ' /root|user/ {print}'
4ps -ef | awk ' /walter/ {c++} END{print "total ", c}'
5ps -ef | awk 'length($0) < 100 {print}'

funciones

1ps -ef | awk '{print length($0)}'
2ps -ef | awk '{sub(/walter/,"waltermas"); print}'
3awk 'BEGIN{ x=3; if(x*2 == 10) printf "%d matched", x; else printf "no match"}'
4awk 'BEGIN{a=3; b=6; (a<3)? c="menor": c="mayor"; print c }'
5awk 'function cuadrado(x) {return x*x} BEGIN{ print cuadrado(4)}'
6awk 'BEGIN{a="hello "; b="world"; print a b}' #concatenation
7awk 'BEGIN{print rand()}'

item.title: docker
item.description:
Como cambiar la carpeta donde guarda las imagenes docker por default.
sudo nvim /etc/docker/daemon.json

Crear el archivo si no existe.
{
"data-root": "/run/media/SATURN/docker-images"
}

Copiar data:
sudo rsync -aP /var/lib/docker/ /discos/SDB1/docker

docker images
docker ps -a

docker pull ubuntu:kinetic
docker run -t -i ubuntu:latest /bin/bash
docker run -t -i [imageid] /bin/bash
-t terminal
-i interactive
press CTRL+P followed by CTRL+Q para salir sin liquidar el container
docker run -ti --entrypoint /bin/sh rclone/rclone #cambiando el entrypoint

item.title: python
item.description:
argumentos

sys.argv[1]

sublista a partir de lista

resultados = [a['title'] for a in r['result']]

list to string

busqueda = ' '.join(lista)

print(f"la variable es {variable}")

virtualenv

1python3 -m venv env
2source env/bin/activate
3pip install ....
4which python
5pip freeze > requirements.txt
6pip list
7deactivate
8pip install -r requirements.txt

list comprenhension

1fruits = ["apple", "banana", "cherry", "kiwi", "mango"]
2newlist = [x for x in fruits if "a" in x]
3print(newlist)

item.title: lua
item.description:
tutorial

Variables

1local number = 5 
2local stringa = "hello, world"
3local single = 'also works'
4local multi = [[ this
5is multi line and literal ]]
6local truth, lies = true, false
7local nothing = nil
8MyGlobalVar = "perri"

functions

 1local function hello(name)
 2    print("hello", name)
 3    return "ok" -- pueden tener varios returns
 4end
 5
 6local greet = function(name)
 7    print("Greetings, " .. name .. "!")
 8end
 9
10local M = {}
11
12M.alpha = function(...) -- todos los parametros
13    print("hola", ...)
14end
15
16M.alpha("hola", "youtube", 2)

tables

 1--lists
 2local list = {"first", 2, false, function() print("Fourth") end }
 3print("yup, 1-indexed", list[1])
 4
 5table.insert(list, "alpha")
 6table.insert(list, 2, "alpha")
 7table.remove(list, 3)
 8
 9
10--maps
11local t = {
12    literal_key = "a string",
13    ["an expression"] = "also works",
14}
15print("literal key :", t.literal_key)

for

 1local favoritos = { "teej", "the primagen", "terminaldoshop"}
 2for index = 1, #favoritos do
 3    print(index, favoritos[index])
 4end
 5
 6for index, value in ipairs(favoritos) do
 7    print(index, value)
 8end
 9
10local scores = { teej = 9.5, theprimagen = "dd"}
11for key, value in pairs(scores) do
12    print(key, value)
13end

if

1if condicion then
2    print("true")
3else
4    print("false")
5end
6-- toma como false: nil, false. Todo lo demas es true
7and -- and
8or -- or
9~= -- es diferente

modules

1-- foo.lua
2local M = {}
3M.cool_function = function() end
4return M
5
6-- bar.lua
7local foo = require('foo')
8foo.cool_function()

lua para vim

tutorial :source %
:messages

item.title: css
item.description:
w3school

las tres maneras

file

1<head>  
2<link rel="stylesheet" href="mystyle.css">  
3</head>

en el head

 1<head>  
 2<style>  
 3body {  
 4  background-color: linen;  
 5}  
 6  
 7h1 {  
 8  color: maroon;  
 9  margin-left: 40px;  
10}  
11</style>  
12</head>

inline

1<p style="color:red;">This is a paragraph.</p>  

 1/*  id="para1" */
 2#para1 {
 3text-align: center;
 4color: red;
 5}
 6
 7/* class="center" */
 8.center {
 9text-align: center;
10color: red;
11}
12/* <p class="center"></p> */
13p.center {
14text-align: center;
15color: red;
16}
17
18/* <p class="center large">para los selectores center y los de large</p> */
19
20h1, h2, p {
21  text-align: center;
22  color: red;
23}

item.title: doom
item.description:
install info

install

1sudo apt install emacs
2git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/doomemacs/doomemacs ~/.config/emacs
3~/.config/emacs/bin/doom install

rmdir -rf ~/.emacs.d para que arranque doom
directorios doom:

  • .config/doom #aca está toda la config
  • .config/emacs
  • .config/emacs/bin
  • .emacs.d/.local/straight/repos/themes/themes/
1[Desktop Entry]
2Type=Application
3Exec=/usr/bin/emacs --daemon
4X-GNOME-Autostart-enabled=true
5NoDisplay=false
6Hidden=false
7Name[es_AR]=emacs server
8Comment[es_AR]=emacs server
9X-GNOME-Autostart-Delay=0

item.title: html
item.description:
w3schools

 1<!-- link: -->
 2<link rel="icon" type="image/x-icon" href="/images/favicon.ico">
 3<a href="https://www.w3schools.com">Visit W3Schools</a>
 4<!-- link as image -->
 5<a href="default.asp" target="_blank"><img src="smiley.gif" alt="HTML tutorial" style="width:42px;height:42px;"></a>
 6
 7<!-- link to bookmark -->
 8<h2 id="C4">Chapter 4</h2>
 9<a href="#C4">Jump to Chapter 4</a>
10
11<!-- image -->
12<img src="img_girl.jpg" width="500" height="600" alt="Girl in a jacket">
13
14<!-- style -->
15<p style="color:red;">This is a red paragraph.</p>
16<p style="background-color:red;">This is a paragraph.</p>
17<p style="font-family:courier;">This is a paragraph.</p>
18<p style="font-size:160%;">This is a paragraph.</p>
19<p style="text-align:center;">Centered paragraph.</p>
20
21<!-- title: se ve como tooltip-->
22<p title="I'm a tooltip">This is a paragraph.</p>
23
24<hr> <!-- horizontal rule -->
25<br> <!-- salto de linea -->
26
27<pre>formatted text</pre>
28
29<!-- formatting -->
30<b> - Bold text </b>
31<strong> - Important text </strong>
32<i> - Italic text </i>
33<em> - Emphasized text </em>
34<mark> - Marked text </mark>
35<small> - Smaller text </small>
36<del> - Deleted text </del>
37<ins> - Inserted text </ins>
38<sub> - Subscript text </sub>
39<sup> - Superscript text </sup>
40
41<!-- colors -->
42<!-- https://www.w3schools.com/colors/colors_names.asp -->
43<h1 style="background-color:rgb(255, 99, 71);">...</h1>
44<h1 style="background-color:#ff6347;">...</h1>
45<h1 style="background-color:hsl(9, 100%, 64%);">...</h1>
46<h1 style="background-color:rgba(255, 99, 71, 0.5);">...</h1>
47<h1 style="background-color:hsla(9, 100%, 64%, 0.5);">...</h1>
48
49<!-- tables -->
50<table>
51  <tr>
52    <!-- table row -->
53    <th>Person 1</th> <!-- table header -->
54    <th>Person 2</th>
55    <th>Person 3</th>
56  </tr>
57  <tr>
58    <td>Email</td> <!-- table data -->
59    <td>Tobias</td>
60    <td>Linus</td>
61  </tr>
62  <tr>
63    <td>16</td>
64    <td>14</td>
65    <td>10</td>
66  </tr>
67</table>
68
69<!-- lists -->
70<!-- unordered list -->
71<ul>
72  <li>Coffee</li>
73  <li>Tea</li>
74  <li>Milk</li>
75</ul>
76<!-- ordered list -->
77<ol>
78  <li>Coffee</li>
79  <li>Tea</li>
80  <li>Milk</li>
81</ol>

item.title: javascript
item.description:
w3school

 1<!DOCTYPE html>
 2<html>
 3
 4<body>
 5
 6  <h1>My First Web Page</h1>
 7  <p>My First Paragraph</p>
 8
 9  <p id="demo"></p>
10
11  <!-- con innerHTML -->
12  <script>
13    document.getElementById("demo").innerHTML = 5 + 6;
14  </script>
15
16  <!-- con document.write -->
17  <script>
18    document.write(5 + 6);
19  </script>
20
21  <!-- con window alert -->
22  <script>
23    window.alert(5 + 6);
24  </script>
25
26  <!-- con console.log F12 para debbuging -->
27  <script>
28    console.log(5 + 6);
29  </script>
30
31</body>
32
33</html>
34
35
36<!-- variables -->
37// no se permite guiones
38// How to create variables:
39var x;
40let y;
41
42// How to use variables:
43x = 5;
44y = 6;
45let z = x + y;
46
47<!-- objetos -->
48const person = {
49firstName: "John",
50lastName: "Doe",
51age: 50,
52eyeColor: "blue"
53};
54
55person.lastName;
56person["lastName"];
57
58<!-- strings -->
59let text = `Welcome ${firstName}, ${lastName}!`;
60
61<!-- arrays -->
62const cars = ["Saab", "Volvo", "BMW"];
63
64<!-- array.forEach -->
65<script>
66  const numbers = [45, 4, 9, 16, 25];
67
68  let txt = "";
69  numbers.forEach(myFunction);
70  document.getElementById("demo").innerHTML = txt;
71
72  function myFunction(value, index, array) {
73    txt += value + "<br>";
74  }
75</script>
76
77<!-- array.map crea un nuevo array -->
78const numbers1 = [45, 4, 9, 16, 25];
79const numbers2 = numbers1.map(myFunction);
80
81function myFunction(value, index, array) {
82return value * 2;
83}

map

1["a", "b", "c"].map(x => x.toUpperCase())
2// resultado: ["A", "B", "C"]

funciones flecha

1const sumar = (a, b) => a + b;
2es igual a:
3function sumar(a, b) {
4  return a + b;
5}

item.title: hardware info
item.description:
lshw
free >>> ram, swap
sudo fdisk -l, muestra particiones
sudo lsblk -no NAME,UUID,LABEL
df -h, muestra espacio
du -sh directorio, muestra el tamaño del dir
uname -r , kernel version
cat /etc/*release
lspci, lsusb
mount
service --status-all

echo "$XDG_SESSION_TYPE" xorg or wayland

item.title: permisos
item.description:
r-- 4= lectura
-w- 2= escritura
--x 1= ejecución
6 (4+2)= lectura y escritura
5 (4+1)= lectura y ejecución
3 (2+1)= escritura y ejecución
7 (4+2+1)= lectura, escritura y ejecución
u owner, g group, o others, a all
r read access, w write access, x execute access
ej chmod g+rw miarchivo.txt
chmod ugo+x programa.sh
chmod u=rwx g=rw o=r filename

item.title: procesos
item.description:
ps -ef, ps -f -u waltermas , pstree, top
jobs, fg %1 , bg %1
CTRL+Z, manda el proceso a background
kill -l, lista todas las señales (mejor parece man kill)
kill -9 PID (force)
xkill, killall, pkill
pgrep firefox, devuelve el pid

item.title: audio
item.description:
pactl list short
pactl set-default-sink 'alsa_output.pci-0000_01_00.1.hdmi-stereo-extra1'
pactl set-default-sink 'alsa_output.pci-0000_00_1f.3.analog-stereo' && pactl set-sink-port 0 analog-output-lineout
pactl set-default-sink 'alsa_output.pci-0000_00_1f.3.analog-stereo' && pactl set-sink-port 0 analog-output-headphones

item.title: copyq
item.description:
copyq web

copyq eval -- "for(i=size(); i>0; --i) print(str(read(i-1)) + '\n');" | fzf #todos los items

item.title: pro user
item.description:
emacs - vim

regYsters

registers
:registers o :reg
para manipular un registro:
normal mode: " letra
insert mode: control-r letra
por ejemplo:
"a yiw, copia la palabra en el registro a
"a p, pega el registro a
spc y, lista de registros
(EM) spc Y, lista de kill ring ( todo lo copiado )
letras mayusculas append lo que copia
"0 guarda el texto copiado (V) "1 a "9 guarda el texto borrado
"% file name
"+ maneja el clipboard del sistema

item.title: programas
item.description:
• baobab, analizador de uso de disco
  • ncdu
  • broot

item.title: arch
item.description:
pacman

 1pacman -S package  #install package  
 2# Manual install
 3pacman -U _/path/to/package/package_name-version.pkg.tar.xz_
 4pacman -U http://www.example.com/repo/example.pkg.tar.xz
 5
 6pacman -R package #remove package
 7pacman -Rs package #remove package and dependencies
 8
 9pacman -Syu #update the system
10S = sync
11y = refresh
12u = update
13
14pacman -Ss string #search string
15pacman -Qs string #search for installed packages
16pacman -Qe #lists all installed packages
17pacman -F string #search for package files
18
19pactree package #tree of dependencies
20
21paccache -r #delete database but the last 3 versions, from pacman-contrib
22pacman -Sc #remove all unused packages
23pacman -Scc #remove all cache files
24
25sudo pacman -Rns $(pacman -Qtdq) #remove orfans packages

mirrors

Edit /etc/pacman.d/mirrorlist uncomment the one you want
arch mirrorlist generator https://archlinux.org/mirrorlist/

item.title: fonts
item.description:
~/.local/share/fonts
/usr/share/fonts/
fc-list list fonts

noto-fonts-emoji

item.title: gnome
item.description:
archivos

~/.icons
~/.themes
~/.config/autostart
~/.local/share/applications
/usr/share/applications
~/.local/share/gnome-shell/extensions/

gnome-look
desktop entry docs

 1[Desktop Entry]
 2Type=Application
 3Encoding=UTF-8
 4Version=1.0
 5Name=Locker
 6GenericName=Locker
 7Comment=my fast lock app
 8Exec=/home/waltermas/MEGAsync/scripts/locker.sh
 9Icon=/home/waltermas/.icons/iconfinder_icon-118-lock-rounded_314696.png
10Categories=GNOME;Application;
11
12[Desktop Entry]
13Encoding=UTF-8
14Version=1.0
15Name=lubuntu 21
16Comment=Starts the VirtualBox machine lubuntu 21
17Type=Application
18Exec=/usr/lib/virtualbox/VirtualBoxVM --comment "lubuntu 21" --startvm "{9c1f2428-9e1d-43cb-a3f8-3f0967bfa190}"
19Icon=lubuntu_logo
20StartupWMClass=VirtualBox Machine UUID: {9c1f2428-9e1d-43cb-a3f8-3f0967bfa190}

dconf-editor
gtk-launch
xprop WM_CLASS

item.title: grub
item.description:
/etc/default/grub
/etc/grub.d/
/boot/grub/grub.cfg

sudo grub-mkconfig -o /boot/grub/grub.cfg

Instalar sin CD

 1menuentry "Mint 10 Julia live CD" {
 2	set root=(hd1,3)
 3	loopback loop /isos/linuxmint-10-gnome-cd-amd64.iso
 4	linux (loop)/casper/vmlinuz boot=casper iso-scan/filename=/isos/linuxmint-10-gnome-cd-amd64.iso
 5	initrd (loop)/casper/initrd.lz
 6}
 7
 8menuentry "Debian 12" {
 9  insmod ext2
10  set isofile="/debian12.iso"
11  loopback loop (hd1,1)$isofile
12  linux (loop)/live/vmlinuz-6.1.0-10-amd64 boot=live findiso=$isofile
13  initrd (loop)/live/initrd.img-6.1.0-10-amd64
14}
15
16en /etc/mtab borrar linea isodevice ( o sudo umount -l /isodevice)

write iso to usb

Comprobar que el usb no esta montado:
sudo lsblk -l
sudo umount /dev/sd
sudo dd bs=4M if=path/to/input.iso of=/dev/sd conv=fdatasync status=progress

item.title: rclone
item.description:
musica

rclone -v --vfs-cache-mode full serve http waltermasnetmega:/Tocadiscos/
listen url

mount folder

rclone mount pcloud:/ pcloudfolder --vfs-cache-mode=full

item.title: ssh
item.description:
generar keys

cd ~
ssh-keygen -t rsa -b 2048
en carpeta .ssh, se agrega en la pagina el contenido de id_rsa.pub

item.title: tar zip
item.description:
comprimir: tar -zcvf nombre-archivo.tar.gz nombre-directorio
descomprimir:
tar -xvf foo.tar
tar -xvzf foo.tar.gz
tar -xvjf foo.tar.bz2

file-roller

item.title: zsh
item.description:
manual
zle tutorial zle -la #lista de comandos(list all)
bindkey #lista de atajos
bindkey "^[[H" beginning-of-line
bindkey "^[[F" end-of-line
bindkey "^[[3~" delete-char

change default shell: chsh -s $(which zsh)
funciona en docker: (como sudo) chsh -s /bin/zsh waltermas

para saber el codigo de las teclas:
cat y enter para ver los keys
ctrl-v y despues la tecla

item.title: bash
item.description:
brave > /dev/null 2>&1
UID , usuario , [ $UID -ne 0 ] , check for super user

1OLDIFS=$IFS
2IFS=$'\n'
3-----
4IFS=$OLDIFS

.xinitrc , lanza el escritorio

argumentos

$# numero de argumentos
$@ todos los argumentos
!$ ultimo argumento
$0 nombre del script
despues del 9: ${10}
$? valor de retorno de error del ultimo script
!:1 tab, expande el argumento 1 del comando anterior

getopts pelado nerd

tail -f xxxxx.log # seguir el log

item.title: info
item.description:
impresora

impresora: brother hl-1212w
driver en carpeta Descargas en Mega
driver

fedora: dnf install printer-driver-brlaser

statter video

en debian /etc/pipewire/pipewire.conf
en fedora /usr/share/pipewire/pipewire.conf

1default.clock.quantum     = 2048
2default.clock.min-quantum = 2048
3default.clock.max-quantum = 4096

radios

radiogarden, buscar red y recargar

lightdm resolution

/etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf

1[Seat:*]  
2display-setup-script=xrandr -s 1680x1050  
3#type=local

freeze

dconf write /org/gnome/calculator/refresh-interval 0

item.description:

  • radiofonica
  • cadena 3 Rosario
  • mitre
  • mar de ajo
  • frecuencia arena
  • arena radio
  • itataia
  • 92.5 FM CFBX

item.title: git
item.description:
comandos basicos

git init
git status
git add -u , git add ., git add -A
git commit -m "mensaje"
git push
git log --oneline
git remote show origin #info del remote
git diff --word-diff=color

ramas

git branch mirama #crea mirama git checkout mirama #switch to mirama
git push -u origin mirama
git merge mirama #desde master
git push origin --delete mirama #borra rama en gitlab
git push -d <remote_name> # Delete remote
git branch -d # Delete local

item.title: markdown
item.description:
cheatsheet

links

[title](https://www.example.com)
